original_abstract: This research investigates the complex challenges and shifting dynamics that define entrepreneurship and innovation within the rapidly evolving digital landscape. By employing a mixed-methods approach that integrates both qualitative and quantitative analyses, the study offers a holistic perspective on how emerging technological disruptions reshape traditional business paradigms. This integrated framework facilitates a nuanced understanding of the unique obstacles and opportunities inherent in the digital era. Ultimately, the findings provide critical insights for entrepreneurs and policymakers, offering a strategic roadmap to navigate uncertainty and foster sustainable innovation in an increasingly digitized global economy.
humanized_abstract: This study is about the challenges and changing circumstances of entrepreneurship and innovation in the age of digital transformation. A mixed methods approach is employed to integrate qualitative and quantitative data in order to provide an in-depth examination of the ways in which digital technologies affect the nature of entrepreneurship and innovation and how businesses can cope with and take advantage of these changes. The study provides policy makers and entrepreneurs with strategic knowledge to navigate uncertainty and achieve sustainable innovation in the digital economy.
